svg.text: System Architecture — Agentic Splunk Telemetry Optimization
Shadow validation · Splunk MCP Server · Multi-agent pipeline · Human-governed OTel export
Live charts · coverage tables · OTel preview
Job runner · audit trail · OTel export
Deterministic · auditable · human gates on policy + approval
Real SPL hit counts via MCP — baseline vs candidate — any custom detections
Detections (any SPL via config/detections.json or Splunk MCP discovery)
Payment Outage · HTTP 5xx · Credential Stuffing · Slow API · Privileged Login · + your custom SPL
Works with application logs · security · Kubernetes · NetOps · any Splunk index
No auto-deploy — human approval before OTel export
Full audit trail in SQLite for every agent action
Rollback YAML generated with collector config
Cut Splunk ingest cost without cutting incident coverage
